text:

Subject: Re: ports/175343: sysutils/rsyslog7 won't build, missing json/json.h
User-Agent: Mutt/1.5.21 (2010-09-15)

Hi Dwane,

Sorry about the delay responding to this.

Can you try building it with the updates committed a few days ago in
r312039?

If not please send me the list of what ports you have installed.


Regards,
Brad Davis

----- End forwarded message -----
